delete.confirm_single: Are you sure you want to delete this quiz?
delete.confirm_bulk: Are you sure? You can't undo this action afterwards.

add_question.title: Empty value or no correct answer
add_question.description: All answer fields should not be empty and should have at least 1 correct answer

finish_quiz.title: You haven't answered all the questions
finish_quiz.description: To finish the quiz you need to answer all required questions

create_quiz.title: Quiz not created
create_quiz.description: First you need to create a quiz and save it

validations.title_too_short: Title must be at least 4 characters long

descriptions.public: Enable quiz access only for you
descriptions.private: Available in public quizzes table, but only accessible with a password
descriptions.public_password: Enable quiz access for all users and displays in public quizzes table
descriptions.private_link: Enable access with a link so only those who have the link can access the quiz
descriptions.private_link_password: Enable private access with a link and password so users without password cannot access the quiz
descriptions.private_users: Enable private access with user id (you can set the list of user ids)

access_messages.requires_link: This quiz requires a private link with token
access_messages.no_permission: You have no permission to this quiz
access_messages.not_in_list: You have no permission to this test. You are not added to restricted users list

quiz_result.title: Your result
quiz_result.rate: How do you rate this quiz?

errors.fetch_quizzes: Something went wrong trying to fetch quizzes data. Reload the page or try it later.
errors.generic_reload: Reload the page or try it later
